title: Template Task - Replace This
story: Atmospheric narrative that sets up the puzzle. Describe the setting and why agents are here.
public_goal: Describe what both agents need to accomplish together
public_context: Optional background context that both agents know

agent_0: Secret knowledge about the mechanics that only agent_0 knows
For example: 'The fridge opens backwards - the close action actually opens it'

agent_roles.agent_0: Expert who discovered the strange mechanics during exploration
agent_roles.agent_1: Novice who must learn through collaboration and communication

success_condition.description: Describe what success looks like in plain English
